issue.message: For `minSdkVersion`=26 only `app:` attributes should be used
For `minSdkVersion`=26 only `app:` attributes should be used
The id `R.id.searchBox` has already been looked up in this method; possible cut & paste error?
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `capitalize(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `capitalize(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `capitalize(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `capitalize(Locale)` instead. For strings meant to be internal use `Locale.ROOT`, otherwise `Locale.getDefault()`.
Implicitly using the default locale is a common source of bugs: Use `String.format(Locale, ...)` instead
Field requires API level 29 (current min is 26): `android.provider.Settings.Panel#ACTION_WIFI`
Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Windows file separators (`\`) and drive letter separators (':') must be escaped (`\\`) in property files; use C\\:/Desktop/7K/7KPROJECTS/TECHNICAL STUFF V2/.bubblewrap/jdk/jdk-17.0.11+9
`@layout/widget_todo_item` includes views not allowed in a `RemoteView`: CheckBox

To get local formatting use `getDateInstance()`, `getDateTimeInstance()`, or `getTimeInstance()`, or use `new SimpleDateFormat(String template, Locale locale)` with for example `Locale.US` for ASCII dates.

To get local formatting use `getDateInstance()`, `getDateTimeInstance()`, or `getTimeInstance()`, or use `new SimpleDateFormat(String template, Locale locale)` with for example `Locale.US` for ASCII dates.

To get local formatting use `getDateInstance()`, `getDateTimeInstance()`, or `getTimeInstance()`, or use `new SimpleDateFormat(String template, Locale locale)` with for example `Locale.US` for ASCII dates.
Must be one or more of: Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION, Intent.FLAG_GRANT_WRITE_URI_PERMISSION

Must be one or more of: MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_SYNC_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_KEY_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_CODEC_CONFIG, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_END_OF_STREAM, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_DECODE_ONLY, but could be MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_SYNC, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_ENCRYPTED, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME

Must be one or more of: MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_SYNC_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_KEY_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_CODEC_CONFIG, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_END_OF_STREAM, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_DECODE_ONLY, but could be MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_SYNC, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_ENCRYPTED, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME

Must be one or more of: MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_SYNC_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_KEY_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_CODEC_CONFIG, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_END_OF_STREAM, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_DECODE_ONLY, but could be MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_SYNC, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_ENCRYPTED, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME

Must be one or more of: MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_SYNC_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_KEY_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_CODEC_CONFIG, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_END_OF_STREAM, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_DECODE_ONLY, but could be MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_SYNC, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_ENCRYPTED, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME

Must be one or more of: MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_SYNC_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_KEY_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_CODEC_CONFIG, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_END_OF_STREAM, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_DECODE_ONLY, but could be MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_SYNC, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_ENCRYPTED, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME

Must be one or more of: MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_SYNC_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_KEY_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_CODEC_CONFIG, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_END_OF_STREAM, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_DECODE_ONLY, but could be MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_SYNC, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_ENCRYPTED, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME

Must be one or more of: MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_SYNC_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_KEY_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_CODEC_CONFIG, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_END_OF_STREAM, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME, MediaCodec.BUFFER_FLAG_DECODE_ONLY, but could be MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_SYNC, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_ENCRYPTED, MediaExtractor.SAMPLE_FLAG_PARTIAL_FRAME
Should use `app:showAsAction` with the appcompat library with `xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"`
Should use `app:showAsAction` with the appcompat library with `xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto"`
Constraints may not be met for some devices
Avoid passing `null` as the view root (needed to resolve layout parameters on the inflated layout's root element)
When using `setHasFixedSize() in an `RecyclerView`, `wrap_content` cannot be used as a value for `size` in the scrolling direction.
Permission is only granted to system apps

A newer version of Gradle than 8.13 is available: 8.14.3
A newer version of `compileSdkVersion` than 34 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.12.0 is available: 1.17.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.11.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.4 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.recyclerview:recyclerview than 1.3.2 is available: 1.4.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-ktx than 2.7.0 is available: 2.9.3
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-livedata-ktx than 2.7.0 is available: 2.9.3
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-runtime-ktx than 2.7.0 is available: 2.9.3
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-common-java8 than 2.7.0 is available: 2.9.3

A newer version of androidx.activity:activity-ktx than 1.8.2 is available: 1.11.0

A newer version of androidx.tracing:tracing than 1.1.0 is available: 1.3.0

A newer version of androidx.test.ext:junit than 1.1.5 is available: 1.3.0
A newer version of androidx.test.espresso:espresso-core than 3.5.1 is available: 3.7.0
Expecting `android:screenOrientation="unspecified"` or `"fullSensor"` for this activity so the user can use the application in any orientation and provide a great experience on Chrome OS devices
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android than 1.7.3 is available: 1.10.2
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-serialization-json than 1.6.0 is available: 1.9.0
A newer version of io.coil-kt:coil than 2.5.0 is available: 2.7.0

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.

Fixed screen orientations will be ignored in most cases, starting from Android 16. Android is moving toward a model where apps are expected to adapt to various orientations, display sizes, and aspect ratios.

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).
The `beginSection()` call is not always closed with a matching `endSection()` because the code in between may return early

It will always be more efficient to use more specific change events if you can. Rely on `notifyDataSetChanged` as a last resort.

This folder configuration (`v26`) is unnecessary; `minSdkVersion` is 26. Merge all the resources in this folder into `mipmap-anydpi`.
Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `ErrorReporter` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This tag and its children can be replaced by one `<TextView/>` and a compound drawable
This library supports using KSP instead of kapt, which greatly improves performance. Learn more: https://developer.android.com/studio/build/migrate-to-ksp
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `@color/sevenk_bg` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.SevenKLauncher`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:attr/colorBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.SevenKLauncher`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:attr/colorBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.SevenKLauncher`)
Possible overdraw: Root element paints background `?android:attr/selectableItemBackground` with a theme that also paints a background (inferred theme is `@style/Theme.SevenKLauncher`)

Buttons in button bars should be borderless; use `style="?android:attr/buttonBarButtonStyle"` (and `?android:attr/buttonBarStyle` on the parent)

issue.message: When you define `paddingEnd` you should probably also define `paddingStart` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
When you define `paddingStart` you should probably also define `paddingEnd` for right-to-left symmetry
